title: Machinations
description: A mod that adds various things, blocks, weapons, armor, etc.
body:
My mod adding various things, in it's current beta release it only includes weapons, a frozen arsenal, and a diamond arsenal.

# VERY WORK IN PROGRESS

I want to add basically everything for me, like blocks, weapons, armor, enchantments, everything, but right now, I only have weapons, I decided to upload it in a alpha just to see how many downloads I would get right now, I want to add more all the time!

# Content:

Currently Include 2 Arsenals and a painting that is the logo of the mod.
The arsenals are the frozen arsenal and the diamond arsenal.


<details>
<summary>FROZEN ARSENAL</summary>
Only includes 1 weapon so far, and by far my best weapon!
FROZEN HAMMER: A big hammer with good damage and low attack speed, it applics freezing and sends enemies upward.

I have planned a frozen sword, and a Frozen Shield!
</details>

<details>
<summary>Diamond Arsenal</summary>
Includes 3 weapons, diamond dagger, claymore (maybe greatsword i dont remember), and a diamond dual sword.
The Diamond dual sword is probably my worst made weapon, it has a good attack speed, and a decent damage.
The diamond Greatsword is decent, high damage low attack speed.
The diamond dagger is low damage very high attack speed

</details>

# COMING SOON:


<details>
<summary>Shadow arsenal</summary>



</details>

<summary>Unstable arsenal</summary>
